title: Democrats Fight Against Corruption in Government
summary: House Democrats in Washington, D.C., have started a new group called a task force to fight corruption and make government more honest. They are worried that people are losing trust in the government because some leaders make decisions for their own benefit instead of for Americans. The task force, led by Rep. Joe Morelle, wants to change rules to stop corruption, like banning stock trading for government workers and setting term limits for Supreme Court justices. They are focusing on President Trump's business deals in other countries, saying this shows corruption, but the White House disagrees and says Trump acts in the public's best interest. This effort is part of Democrats' plan to win back control of Congress in the upcoming elections.

keywords.explanation: a special group formed to work on a specific problem
when people in power do dishonest things for personal gain
the group of people who make laws and run a country
one of the two main political parties in the United States
official instructions that people must follow
when people vote to choose their leaders

questions.question: What is the main goal of the Democrats' task force?
Who is leading the task force?
Why are Democrats worried about the government?
options: People are losing trust in it
It is building too many parks
questions.correct_answer: People are losing trust in it

questions.question: What is one rule change the task force might propose?
options: Banning stock trading for government workers
Allowing more video games in schools
Reducing the number of cars on roads
questions.correct_answer: Banning stock trading for government workers

questions.question: What do Democrats say about President Trump's business deals?
options: They are very helpful for schools
They are all in the United States

questions.question: What is the White House's response to the corruption claims?
options: They say Trump acts in the public's best interest
They want to close the government
They are starting their own task force
questions.correct_answer: They say Trump acts in the public's best interest

background_read: In the United States, the government is run by elected leaders from different political parties, like Democrats and Republicans. Sometimes, people in government might do things that are not honest, which is called corruption. This can make citizens lose trust. Elections happen regularly where people vote to choose who will lead. Recently, Democrats have been concerned about corruption under President Trump and are trying to make changes to improve trust before the next elections.
Article_Structure: WHO: House Democrats and Rep. Joe Morelle
WHAT: They started a task force to fight corruption and change ethics rules
WHERE: In Washington, D.C., the capital of the United States
WHY: To regain public trust and win back control of Congress in elections

perspectives.description: They believe there is corruption in government, especially related to Trump's business deals, and want to fix it with new rules.
They deny corruption claims and say President Trump acts in the best interests of the American public.
